capture_gap.current_claim: Kavaliro appears near SMX, Parsons, Alion, CACI, The Unconventional, and vehicles CEOIS, JCETII, C3PO, and LEIA.
capture_gap.missing_fact: Exact vehicle role, prime relationship, workshare, timing, and current-vs-historical status remain unverified.
capture_gap.why_it_matters: This uncertainty weakens teammate mapping and incumbent pressure.
capture_gap.business_impact: Affects bid posture, teammate targeting, and where capture should apply effort first.
questions_to_ask: Was Kavaliro on LEIA, C3PO, or both?
Under which prime did Kavaliro perform?
What capability lane or labor category did Kavaliro hold?
Was the relationship current, predecessor-bound, or one-off?
Did The Unconventional and Kavaliro sit on the same team or on adjacent teams?

acceptable_proof.minimum_standard: one first-party artifact or two independent corroborations
acceptable_proof.upgrade_rule: do not promote proximity to confirmed teammate status without corroboration
acceptable_proof.disqualifying_state: single-source hearsay with no supporting artifact

capture_gap.recommended_next_action: Pressure the SMX to LEIA/C3PO lineage first, then confirm whether The Unconventional and Kavaliro co-appear on the same pursuit or only adjacent ones.

field_closure_pack.mission: Resolve grey-zone teammate and vehicle posture around The Unconventional and SMX-linked vehicle work.
field_closure_pack.working_picture: Kavaliro sits in a proximity map near SMX, Parsons, Alion, CACI, The Unconventional, CEOIS, JCETII, C3PO, and LEIA. Official corroboration remains thin.
questions: Was Kavaliro on LEIA, C3PO, or both?
Under which prime did Kavaliro perform?
What workshare or capability lane did Kavaliro hold?
proof_targets: first-party page or archived teaming reference
red_flags: vehicle name confusion across predecessor and successor programs
claim upgrade from proximity to confirmed role without proof
recommended_next_actions: Start with SMX lineage and predecessor/successor clarification.
Validate whether The Unconventional and Kavaliro appear on the same team or only the same mission space.

closure_evidence.evidence_text: Contact stated Kavaliro supported predecessor C3PO under SMX in analytics staffing, but could not confirm LEIA carryover.
closure_evidence.follow_on_action: Need one independent corroboration or artifact before promoting to confirmed C3PO support.
